case_title: CHAN, WAYNE vs. LASERA, DAMON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, WAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LASERA, DAMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1740 SUTTER ST #205, LEASE FORFEITED
